support.detail: Early-stage RFI evaluation ($100k, not forecasted). No blocked discount, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-peer relationship is the gating constraint. Any exec-connect to Eduardo/CFO could be done by a CRO/SVP.
support.why_not_vp: A VP/CRO can build the second exec thread to the CFO and run competitive positioning; nothing requires the CEO personally at RFI stage.

monitor.reason: No qualifying <=14-day trigger: deal is not large/forecasted, open deliverables are not yet due (7-12) and we are buyer-dependent (awaiting RFI downselect), and all competitor signals are dated 18 Jun 2026 (outside the 14-day window).
